role_title: Senior Associate, Strategy & Operations, DoorDash for Business

level_signals: 2+ years of experience required in strategy & operations, management consulting, or high-growth B2B/marketplace

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 2+ years of experience in strategy & operations, management consulting, or a high-growth B2B or marketplace environment.
You have a track record of owning GTM initiatives end-to-end—from strategy through execution—and are comfortable building processes in ambiguous, early-stage environments.
You're analytically strong: you write SQL, work fluently with data, and know how to distill complexity into clear recommendations.
You demonstrate fluency with AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Cursor, or similar) to automate workflows, surface insights, and drive faster, better decisions.
You communicate with clarity and influence—you can tailor your message for operators, sales teams, and senior leadership alike.
You have the willingness to roll up your sleeves and understand lowest level of detail

scope.surface: DoorDash for Business Catering product lines — GTM strategy, merchant/customer onboarding, operational playbooks
scope.business_model: B2B corporate dining and benefits platform (catering/meal programs)
core_responsibilities: Define and execute go-to-market approach for merchant and customer acquisition
Design onboarding playbooks, qualification frameworks, and operational processes
Use AI tools to query large datasets, automate workflows, and build dashboards
Synthesize field feedback and data signals into product and operational recommendations
Define and track KPIs for customer and merchant health and GTM effectiveness

green_flags: Compensation range explicitly disclosed ($87K-$128K base nationally)
Remote or hybrid flexibility explicitly stated
Clear ownership area — catering GTM and onboarding for a defined product line
Applications accepted on an ongoing basis (not time-pressured)
Comprehensive benefits package described in detail
red_flags: No specific office locations tied to the role are listed, making the hybrid expectation ambiguous
Pay range is wide ($41K spread) and 'localized according to work location' — actual take-home highly variable by city
Early-stage/ambiguous environment may mean limited structure or resources

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Senior Associate', years requirement, and comp range)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly listed in JD)
location.remote_us_eligible (inferred from 'remotely or hybrid depending preference' language)
location.cities_listed (no specific cities tied to this role stated in JD body)
ambiguities: Work location described as 'remotely or hybrid depending preference' — it is unclear whether full remote is truly available or just flexible hybrid; treated as hybrid with remote eligibility.
Visa sponsorship is not mentioned anywhere in the JD; left as 'unclear'.
The pay range note mentions Illinois and Colorado specifically alongside the national range, suggesting localized pay tiers exist but the JD does not break them out.
